input.prompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and

input.initialPrompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

data.content:
Here's a MAUI `CollectionView` with single selection and pull-to-refresh:

**XAML:**
```xml
<RefreshView Command="{Binding RefreshCommand}"
             IsRefreshing="{Binding IsRefreshing}">
    <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}"
                    SelectionMode="Single"
                    SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem}"
                    SelectionChangedCommand="{Binding SelectionChangedCommand}">
        <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            <DataTemplate x:DataType="models:Item">
                <VerticalStackLayout Padding="10">
                    <Label Text="{Binding Name}" FontSize="16" />
                    <Label Text="{Binding Description}" FontSize="12" TextColor="Gray" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>
            </DataTemplate>
        </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
    </CollectionView>
</RefreshView>
```

**ViewModel bindings needed:**

| Property/Command | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Items` (ObservableCollection) | Data source |
| `SelectedItem` | Two-way bound; reset to `null` after navigation to allow reselection |
| `SelectionChangedCommand` | Triggers navigation to detail page |
| `RefreshCommand` (async) | Calls your API to reload data |
| `IsRefreshing` (bool) | Set `false` when refresh completes |

**ViewModel sketch:**
```csharp
[ObservableProperty] ObservableCollection<Item> items;
[ObservableProperty] Item? selectedItem;
[ObservableProperty] bool isRefreshing;

[RelayCommand]
async Task Refresh()
{
    Items = new ObservableCollection<Item>(await _api.GetItemsAsync());
    IsRefreshing = false;
}

[RelayCommand]
async Task SelectionChanged()
{
    if (SelectedItem is null) return;
    await Shell.Current.GoToAsync(nameof(DetailPage),
        new Dictionary<string, object> { ["Item"] = SelectedItem });
    SelectedItem = null; // allow re-selection
}
```

**Key points:**
- `SelectionMode="Single"` — only one item selectable at a time.
- Nulling `SelectedItem` after navigation lets the same item be tapped again.
- `RefreshView` wraps the `CollectionView`; binding `IsRefreshing` to `false` stops the spinner.
- Uses CommunityToolkit.Mvvm source generators (`[ObservableProperty]`, `[RelayCommand]`).
